data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — surveyed all tk references in tests/skills/. Files needing changes: (1) test-end-session-rationalized-failures.sh: update test_step_references_tk_list_bug to accept ticket list pattern; (2) test-end-session-error-sweep.sh: rename _mock_tk_list_* functions to _mock_ticket_list_*; (3) test_task_execution_template.py: update docstrings from 'tk create' to 'ticket create'; (4) test_end_session_no_auto_sync.py: update to check ticket sync in addition to tk sync.
